Detailed Description

Implements functions related to execution.

Definition in file exec.cpp.

Function Documentation

void sprite::execute (  Program const &  program,
Node &  goal,
YieldHandler const &  handler = YieldHandler_< void >(),
TraceOption  trace = NO_TRACE
) 
 

Execute a goal in the context of the given program.

This is the the primary entry point to the execution system. Execution proceeds in-place, meaning that the goal expression will likely be modified.

Parameters:
program The program definition. This provides the necessary information to carry out execution as a series of rewrite steps.
goal The goal statement. Modified in place.
handler (optional) Defaults to a handler that discards the generated results. The object that handles output as it is generated.
trace (optional) Defaults to true. Enables debug tracing.
